name: codex-council
description: Local Codex Council workflows with subagent roles and a durable MCP blackboard.

interface.shortDescription: Run role-based Codex subagent councils over a local MCP blackboard.
interface.longDescription: Codex Council coordinates role-based subagents for review, design, and explicitly authorized implementation work. It stores durable local state in a SQLite-backed MCP blackboard and keeps large evidence in workspace artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Run a standard council review of this project.
Use a council to design this change.
Implement this with council writer mode.
